entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00104) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO: (A) EXERCISE OPTION 12, LOT YEAR XII UNDER THE FLIGHT SCHOOL XXI SIMULATION SERVICES CONTRACT, (B) TO ANNOTATE THE RESULTS OF THE AWARD TERM DECISION FOR THE PERIOD ENDING 31 DEC 2014 IN SECTION H.17 AS DETERMINED BY THE TERM DETERMINING OFFICIAL (TDO) IAW THE AWARD TERM PLAN OF THIS SERVICE CONTRACT; AND (C) TO UPDATE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER¿S REPRESENTATIVE (COR) DATA IN SECTIONS F.2, G.1, AND G.6 TO REFLECT THE APPROPRIATE PERSONNEL.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00105) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: B.12 OPT 11 LOT XII CONTRACTED MISSSION

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00106) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES THE UH-72A IFT AND OFT TRAINING SERVICES CAPABILITY INTO THE FLIGHT SCHOOL XXI CONTRACT. THE TH-67 CREEK TRAINING SERVICES HAVE BEEN REMOVED FROM THE FLIGHT SCHOOL XXI CONTRACT

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00111) awarded to CSC GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
B.14 OPT 13 LOT XIV CONTRACTED MISSION
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MARK LOCAL CLAUSE H.15. TO A RESERVED STATUS AND CODIFY SEVERAL DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENTS. IN ADDITION, IT UPDATED THE COR INFORMATION.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES
